name: python-quest-generator
description: Themed Python Quest Generation web app (Next.js + Genkit + Firebase).

scripts.test:int: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-quest-generator "vitest run --config vitest.int.config.ts"

comment-runtime-deps: Framework layers (Genkit flow, Firestore store, server actions, Next.js UI) additionally require: next, react, react-dom, @genkit-ai/google-genai, genkit, firebase, and (dev) @playwright/test. These are intentionally not installed in the initial domain-core build; add them when implementing those phases (see specs/001-themed-quest-generation/tasks.md).
